[[Major/Legends|Major]] '''Vontenn''' was the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] [[Imperial Liaison Officer of Sentientology Studies|Liaison Officer of Sentientology Studies]]. In this capacity, Vontenn was involved with the production of [[Obo Rin]]'s ''[[Catalog of Intelligent Life in the Galaxy]], Revised Edition'', which was commissioned by [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] himself.
